notes: Cross-org routing test. A business-domain directive (a BoisCRE DEAL PIPELINE) is CARRIED to that business's OWN org via the cross-org dispatch path (dispatch-cxo.sh / an inbox handoff into the BoisCRE CxO inbox; COS supervises that the handoff fires) and OWNED by BoisCRE COO (charter 'transactions/pipeline', via boiscre-pipeline-watcher) — NOT the server CKO (lattice). The server CKO is Knowledge & Records infra (SOT/catalog, filesystem, retention, doc standards); it only audits/proposes inside business folders and never owns business workflows. Mis-routing to the server CKO (lattice) is the failure this guards against.
